productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Kids Unisex Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue denim jeans made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front with one coin pocket, two patch pockets on the back, elasticated waistband with belt loops and metal zipper and button closure on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water with mild detergent Do not bleach Remove promptly and avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get your little one up and about in a pair of jeans from gini and jony that plays as hard as they do. Team this with a white tee and crocs footwear when you take them out next time, while the soft cotton fabric keeps them feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
